# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

```typescript
import { VercelRequest, VercelResponse } from '@vercel/node';

export default async (req: VercelRequest, res: VercelResponse) => {
  if (req.method === 'POST') {
    const body = await new Promise<string>((resolve) => {
      let data = '';
      req.on('data', (chunk) => {
        data += chunk;
      });
      req.on('end', () => resolve(data));
    });
    
    const headers: Record<string, string | string[]> = {};
    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(req.headers)) {
      if (!key.startsWith('x-')) continue; // Skip non-custom headers
      headers[key] = Array.isArray(value) ? value[0] : value;
    }
    
    res.set(headers);
    
    const reader = new ReadableStream({
      start(controller: ReadableStreamDefaultController<Uint8Array>) {
        controller.enqueue(new TextEncoder().encode(body));
        controller.close();
      }
    });
    
    return new Response(reader, { status: 200 });
  } else {
    res.setHeader('Allow', 'POST');
    res.status(405).end('Method Not Allowed');
 <｜begin▁of▁sentence｜>// This is a typo in the original code. The closing tag should be `</code>` not `</s>`. I have corrected it for you.
